notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly ordinary visible events (Fang Yuan's soul cultivation, refining attempts, travel) and ambiguous relations. The only potentially hidden element is the mysterious Gu Immortal with red lotus mark who suppressed the great strength true martial body - but this is presented as a past historical event from a scene Fang Yuan observes, not a currently hidden fact with clear whoKnows/whoDoesNotKnow supported by the source. No directly supported private knowledge, future-known information, or secret motives/plans with clear source backing.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly factual events and descriptions without clear observed actions that reveal character motives. Fang Yuan's actions (entering Luo Po Valley for soul tempering, using courage Gu to heal, abandoning a Gu refinement) are described as cultivation steps without direct context showing his underlying motives beyond the obvious. The events about Bo Qing, the mysterious Gu Immortal, etc. are third-party reports without direct observation of their motives. No strong observedMotive → inferredMotive chain can be constructed with high confidence from this seed.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed package focuses on individual cultivation events (Fang Yuan refining soul in Luopo Valley, healing soul injuries, refining immortal gu). No collective faction, clan, family, or group appears in the entities, relations, or events. Entities are all individuals (Fang Yuan, Bo Qing, You Hun Mo Zun, Le Tu Xian Zun). Relations are individual-level (Fang Yuan enslaves Zhou Zhong, Fang Yuan allies with Tai Bai Yun Sheng). No named faction, clan, family, shop, hall, or organization has a concrete stake in the seed facts. Cannot derive faction pressure from individual-only subjects.
IF export filter quarantined 11 legacy old-schema branches.
